text: 39. Subcontractor shall execute fabrication and installation of the countertops by skilled mechanics and employ skilled countertop fitters  at  the  Project  to  do  necessary  field  cutting  as  needed.  Field  cutting  location  on-site  shall  be coordinated and approved by Contractor prior to mobilization. Subcontractor shall use a wet saw for any field cuts on all countertops as necessary and is responsible for fully protecting the floor and other finishes from any moisture. Field cutting will require dust collection and containment in accordance with all AHJs.
